steps.title: Use the final claim
steps.content: The passage says hyperpop artists manipulate recorded voices and concludes that this modification invites listeners to reflect on how digital technology mediates human experience today. That supports a description about commentary on present-day conditions.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported descriptions
steps.content:
• Choice A: The passage does not call digital technology's influence negative.
  • Choice B: The passage focuses on contemporary mediation, not continuity across social and historical change.
  • Choice D: The passage does not claim vocal manipulation shapes listeners' sense of self.
The answer is C.
